title: How Many Business Phone Lines Do I Need?
description: Estimate line and user needs before requesting provider quotes.
quickAnswer: Most cloud phone systems price by user rather than physical line. Start with active employees who need calling, then add shared numbers, call queues, and conference needs.
bestFor: Companies adding call queues or departments
notBestFor: One-person businesses with only a mobile number
Teams with highly custom call-center requirements

faqs.question: Do shared numbers cost extra?
faqs.answer: Often yes, but pricing varies by provider and plan.
